title: CrudeCraft
description: An Adventure / Magic based pack with mythical creatures and many dungeons!
body:
This modpack uses the likes of Ice and Fire and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks in order to make a magical but dangerous adventure! Combined with the End Remastered and Deeper and Darker to spice up the end-game!



This modpack contains-

9 different Magic types to master thanks to Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks!

2 Types of Dragon to Hunt & Raise from a Hatchling!

Various Biomes and Structures to explore, thanks to The Graveyard and Spelunkery!

A plethora of new Tools and Weapons with Tetra and included Compatibility packs!



Start your journey Today!
